creator: jbo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Generally a git-format patch is nicer to work with for committers as it saves us the trouble of crafting the commit message from scratch and manually recording the author information.

A preliminary question: Is there a particular reason why GH_ACCOUNT is not BrowserWorks? Appears to be just a redirect.

I'm currently checking what the process looks like if a port for the same upstream already existed previously but was abandoned.
